agents.lastMessage: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a negatively charged resi

report.hypothesis: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a negatively charged residue at position 6 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions while disrupting off-target (SSTR3/5) electrostatic complementarity, thereby increasing the selectivity margin.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong selectivity (Δmargin > 0) but are faili

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong selectivity (Δmargin > 0) but are failing structurally due to poor geometry. The focus should remain on maintaining selectivity while improving structural validity through tighter clash constraints and increased candidate diversity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Low pass rate suggests insufficient diversity in candidate generation. Increasing the number of candidates will improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs.
Structural failures may be due to steric clashes in the designed peptides. Tightening the clash threshold will enforce better geometry and reduce structural artifacts.
